overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing an astronaut struggling through a severe dust storm on a rocky planet surface, then entering an industrial hangar and moving stealthily between parked vehicles. The footage features high-quality cinematic rendering with dynamic lighting transitions from the stormy exterior to the artificially lit interior.

events.description: character transitions from crawling to stumbling upright against the wind
visibility improves slightly as character approaches the facility entrance

agents.ego_description: struggling forward through a severe dust storm, crawling and stumbling toward a distant structure

entered.detail: thick brown dust particles reducing visibility to near zero
uneven rocky and sandy ground surface
dark entrance to industrial facility visible through the storm

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character in a spacesuit battling extreme weather conditions on an alien planet. Visibility is severely limited by a dense dust storm as the character crawls and stumbles toward a facility entrance, with rocky terrain underfoot and dim lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial vehicle hangar with emergency lighting

events.description: character enters the facility from the dust storm into an illuminated hangar
scene brightens with artificial overhead lights and red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the hangar and walking toward parked vehicles while surveying the area

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near a vehicle in the background

entered.detail: large armored vehicle with headlights on
structural support beams of the hangar ceiling
pulsing red warning lights along the hangar walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large industrial hangar from the storm, transitioning to an environment with artificial lighting and red emergency lights. The space contains parked futuristic vehicles and metal structural elements, with another figure visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle maintenance bay with heavy machinery

events.description: character crouches down and takes cover behind a vehicle
character moves behind large vehicle wheels, temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: crouching and moving stealthily between parked vehicles, using them for cover

entered.detail: large treaded wheel of the parked vehicle
triangular caution symbol on the vehicle hull
industrial piping running along the hangar ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character adopts a stealth posture, crouching behind large vehicles and moving carefully through the maintenance bay. The environment features heavy industrial machinery, warning signage, and dramatic red lighting as the character navigates between the parked vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic, blinding dust storm on a rocky alien surface into the oppressive, artificial atmosphere of an industrial hangar. It begins with a character in a spacesuit struggling through dense debris and limited visibility, crawling across the rocky terrain toward distant, dim lights. As the character crosses the threshold of the facility, the scene shifts abruptly from the gray storm to a cavernous interior illuminated by harsh artificial lights and pulsing red emergency beacons. The camera then follows the character as they drop into a stealthy crouch, weaving through a maintenance bay filled with heavy machinery and warning signs. Finally, the movement slows as the character navigates carefully between the shadows of parked futuristic vehicles, avoiding a figure visible in the distance.
